name: MTB_MALZEME_HAREKET_KARSILASTIRMA
definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[MTB_MALZEME_HAREKET_KARSILASTIRMA]
AS
---hareket envanteri

SELECT  


T.[Malzeme Kodu],T.[Malzeme Adi], 
(SELECT TOP 1 STOK_GRUP FROM AA_SIPARIS_SATINALMA_RAPORU_YENI_123 WHERE STOK_KODU=T.[Malzeme Kodu]) 'Malzeme Grup Kodu',
ISNULL((SELECT SUM(MIKTAR) FROM AA_SIPARIS_SATINALMA_RAPORU_YENI_123 WHERE STOK_KODU=T.[Malzeme Kodu]),0) 'SATINALMA',
(T.[Satinalma Iade Miktari]) 'İADE',

--(T.[Devir Miktari] + T.[VİRMAN Giriş Miktari] +

--T.[Satinalma Miktari] -T.[Satinalma Iade Miktari]- ISNULL(ROUND((SELECT SUM (ONHAND) FROM LV_123_01_STINVTOT WHERE STOCKREF=T.LOGICALREF AND INVENNO=2),3),0)) ' SATINALAMA',
--T.[Satis Iade Miktari],T.[Üretimden Giriş Miktari],T.[Satis Miktari],T.[Satinalma Iade Miktari],
--T.[Sarf-Fire Miktari],T.[Sayım Fazlası],T.[Sayım Eksiği],T.[Diğer Girişler],t.[Diğer Çıkışlar],

--round((t.[Devir Miktari]+ t.[Satinalma Miktari]+t.[Satis Iade Miktari]+t.[Üretimden Giriş Miktari]+t.[Sayım Fazlası]+t.[Diğer Girişler]) -
--(t.[Satis Miktari]+t.[Satinalma Iade Miktari]+t.[Sarf-Fire Miktari]+t.[Sayım Eksiği]+t.[Diğer Çıkışlar]) ,2) 'Eldeki Miktar' ,

--ISNULL(ROUND((SELECT SUM (ONHAND) FROM LV_123_01_STINVTOT WHERE STOCKREF=T.LOGICALREF AND INVENNO=2),3),0) ' SATINALAMA',

--T.[Malzeme Kodu],T.[Malzeme Adi],(T.[Devir Miktari] +

--T.[Satinalma Miktari] -T.[Satinalma Iade Miktari]-
--T.[Satis Iade Miktari]--,T.[Üretimden Giriş Miktari],T.[Satis Miktari],T.[Satinalma Iade Miktari],
--T.[Sarf-Fire Miktari],T.[Sayım Fazlası],T.[Sayım Eksiği],T.[Diğer Girişler],t.[Diğer Çıkışlar],

--round((t.[Devir Miktari]+ t.[Satinalma Miktari]+t.[Satis Iade Miktari]+t.[Üretimden Giriş Miktari]+t.[Sayım Fazlası]+t.[Diğer Girişler]) -
--(t.[Satis Miktari]+t.[Satinalma Iade Miktari]+t.[Sarf-Fire Miktari]+t.[Sayım Eksiği]+t.[Diğer Çıkışlar]) ,2) 'Eldeki Miktar' ,

--ISNULL(ROUND((SELECT SUM (ONHAND) FROM LV_123_01_STINVTOT WHERE STOCKREF=T.LOGICALREF AND INVENNO=2),3),0)) ' SATINALAMA',
(A.[2 DEN ÇIKIŞ ]-A.[2 YE GIRIS ])'SİSTEMSEL '
--A.[11 ÇIKIŞ ]-A.[5 ÇIKIŞ ] )'SİSTEMSEL '
,
ISNULL(TA.TAMIKTAR,0) 'TALEP',
ISNULL((SELECT SUM(ONHAND) FROM LV_123_01_STINVTOT WHERE INVENNO =2 AND STOCKREF=T.LOGICALREF ),0) 'Gebze Stok',
ISNULL(T.[Devir Miktari],0)  'Devir'

FROM (
SELECT 
K.CODE 'Malzeme Kodu',
K.NAME 'Malzeme Adi', 
K.LOGICALREF,

SUM(CASE WHEN K.TRCODE=14 AND K.STFICHEREF >0   THEN K.AMOUNT ELSE 0  END) 'Devir Miktari',

SUM(CASE   WHEN  K.EXIMFCTYPE IN (7) THEN (CASE WHEN K.TRCODE=25 AND K.EXIMFILEREF >0  THEN K.AMOUNT ELSE 0  END) 
 WHEN  K.EXIMFCTYPE IN (1) THEN (CASE WHEN K.TRCODE=1  THEN 0 ELSE 0  END)
ELSE (CASE WHEN K.TRCODE=1 THEN K.AMOUNT ELSE 0 END)  END) 'Satinalma Miktari',

SUM(CASE WHEN K.TRCODE IN (2,3) AND K.STFICHEREF >0 THEN K.AMOUNT ELSE 0  END) 'Satis Iade Miktari',

SUM(CASE WHEN K.TRCODE=13 AND K.STFICHEREF >0 THEN K.AMOUNT ELSE 0  END) 'Üretimden Giriş Miktari',
SUM(CASE WHEN K.TRCODE=13 AND K.FROMTRANSFER=1 THEN K.AMOUNT ELSE 0  END) 'VİRMAN Giriş Miktari',
SUM(CASE WHEN K.TRCODE=8 THEN K.AMOUNT ELSE 0  END) 'Satis Miktari',

SUM(CASE WHEN K.TRCODE=6 THEN K.AMOUNT ELSE 0  END) 'Satinalma Iade Miktari',

SUM(CASE WHEN K.TRCODE IN (11,12) THEN K.AMOUNT ELSE 0  END) 'Sarf-Fire Miktari',

SUM(CASE WHEN K.TRCODE=50 THEN K.AMOUNT ELSE 0  END) 'Sayım Fazlası',

SUM(CASE WHEN K.TRCODE=51 THEN K.AMOUNT ELSE 0  END) 'Sayım Eksiği',

SUM(CASE WHEN K.TRCODE IN (15,16,17,18,19,30,31,32,33,34) THEN K.AMOUNT ELSE 0  END) 'Diğer Girişler',

SUM(CASE WHEN K.TRCODE IN (20,21,22,23,24,35,36,37,38,39) THEN K.AMOUNT ELSE 0  END) 'Diğer Çıkışlar',

CONVERT(DATETIME,'01-01-2200',103) TARIH,
K.CARDTYPE 

FROM (
SELECT  S.TRCODE,I.CODE,S.AMOUNT*(S.UINFO2/S.UINFO1)'Amount',I.NAME,I.LOWLEVELCODES1,S.STFICHEREF,S.RETCOST, 
 S.TOTAL,S.VATMATRAH,UN.CODE 'B',I.SPECODE,S.DIFFPRICE,S.DATE_,I.CARDTYPE,I.LOGICALREF,S.OUTCOST,S.DIFFPRCOST,S.EXIMFILEREF,
 S.EXIMFCTYPE,S.EXIMWHFCREF,F.FROMTRANSFER

FROM LG_123_01_STLINE S (NOLOCK)
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_ITEMS I (NOLOCK) ON I.LOGICALREF=S.STOCKREF  AND I.ACTIVE=0
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_UNITSETL UN (NOLOCK) ON UN.LOGICALREF=S.UOMREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_STFICHE F (NOLOCK) ON F.LOGICALREF=S.STFICHEREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_INVOICE INV ON INV.LOGICALREF=S.INVOICEREF

WHERE S.LINETYPE=0   AND S.CANCELLED=0 AND S.TRCODE <> 0 AND S.LPRODSTAT=0 AND I.CARDTYPE<>4  AND S.UINFO1>0   AND S.IOCODE<>3

AND I.CARDTYPE not IN (4,22)  

GROUP BY S.TRCODE,I.CODE,I.LOWLEVELCODES1,S.AMOUNT,S.UINFO2,S.UINFO1,I.NAME,S.STFICHEREF,S.OUTCOST,S.DIFFPRCOST,S.EXIMFILEREF,S.RETCOST,
 S.TOTAL,S.VATMATRAH,UN.CODE,I.SPECODE,S.DIFFPRICE,S.DATE_,I.CARDTYPE,I.LOGICALREF, S.EXIMFCTYPE,S.EXIMWHFCREF,S.STOCKREF,S.LOGICALREF,S.INVOICEREF,F.FROMTRANSFER)  K

GROUP BY K.CODE,K.NAME,K.LOWLEVELCODES1,K.B, K.SPECODE,K.CARDTYPE,K.LOGICALREF
) AS T 

LEFT JOIN 
---A
(SELECT 
ITM.LOGICALREF,
ITM.CODE, ITM.NAME,
ISNULL((SELECT SUM(AMOUNT) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE TRCODE=25 AND SOURCEINDEX=2  AND IOCODE=3 AND STOCKREF= ITM.LOGICALREF AND CANCELLED=0) ,0)'2 DEN ÇIKIŞ ',
ISNULL((SELECT SUM(AMOUNT) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE TRCODE=25 AND SOURCEINDEX=2 AND DESTINDEX IN (5,11) AND IOCODE=2 AND STOCKREF= ITM.LOGICALREF AND CANCELLED=0) ,0)'2 YE GIRIS '
--ISNULL((SELECT SUM(AMOUNT) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE TRCODE=25 AND SOURCEINDEX=2 AND DESTINDEX=11 AND IOCODE=3 AND STOCKREF= ITM.LOGICALREF AND CANCELLED=0),0) '11 GİRİŞ ',
--ISNULL((SELECT SUM(AMOUNT) FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WHERE TRCODE=25 AND SOURCEINDEX=2 AND DESTINDEX=11 AND IOCODE=2 AND STOCKREF= ITM.LOGICALREF AND CANCELLED=0),0) '11 ÇIKIŞ '

FROM  LG_123_ITEMS ITM 
  ) A ON A.LOGICALREF=T.[LOGICALREF]

 LEFT JOIN 
 (SELECT ALT_MAL_REF,ALT_KOD,SUM(MIKTAR)'TAMIKTAR' FROM DST_123_KARSILASTIRMA_YARDIMCI GROUP BY ALT_KOD,ALT_MAL_REF)  TA

 ON TA.ALT_KOD=T.[Malzeme Kodu]

 --GROUP BY T.[Malzeme Kodu],T.[Malzeme Adi]
  --WHERE T.[Malzeme Kodu]='MKSF0099H002'
